description_long: This object is a fantastical flower with a large, pale pink, five-petaled bloom at its center, featuring a circular mouth-like structure with sharp teeth, giving it a menacing appearance. The flower is surrounded by several long, twisting green vines that extend outward, each adorned with multiple dark green, ovate leaves. The petals are symmetrically arranged in a radial pattern, and the central mouth is ringed by a pale yellow border. The vines are sinuous and appear flexible, with some curling and branching off in different directions. The overall structure is organic and dynamic, with the flower head as the focal point and the vines providing a sense of movement. This object would stand out in an urban park or garden due to its unusual and slightly monstrous design.
description: A large, pink, five-petaled flower with a toothy central mouth, surrounded by twisting green vines and dark green ovate leaves. The design is both organic and fantastical, with a striking, menacing appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full face of the flower, with all five petals, the central mouth, and the sprawling vines with leaves clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the thinness of the flower head and the depth of the central mouth, with vines and leaves extending outward.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the petals and the network of green vines, with the flower's mouth hidden from sight.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlights the profile of the flower and the arrangement of vines and leaves, similar to view 1 but from the other side.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a radial configuration, with five distinct petals symmetrically spaced around the central mouth. The arrangement is regular and evenly distributed, with no visible overlapping or layering.
